articles.title: Tilak Varma, Shardul Thakur hand PBKS fifth successive defeat
articles.description: Jasprit Bumrah enjoys success in his first IPL game as MI captain

articles.title: Saudi Arabia set to launch Dunes League T20 in October
articles.description: It will be Saudi Arabia's first franchise league, and is expected to feature retired 'legends' who are still active in the franchise circuit

articles.title: Andrew Flintoff set to be named new Sydney Thunder BBL coach
articles.description: Former England allrounder is set for his first franchise coaching role overseas after two seasons in the Hundred with Northern Superchargers outside of his current England Lions role

articles.title: Kohli's ninth IPL hundred powers RCB to the top
articles.description: Kohli's unbeaten 60-ball 105 was a vintage effort in a run-chase and halted KKR's four-match winning streak

articles.title: Sarah Taylor appointed England Men's Test fielding coach for New Zealand series
articles.description: Taylor set to become first female coach to work with senior England men's team

articles.title: Marcus North confirmed as England Men's new national selector
articles.description: Durham's director of cricket takes over after lengthy search to replace outgoing Luke Wright

articles.title: GT go No. 1 after Rabada and Holder rout SRH
articles.description: GT sealed their biggest win and handed SRH their biggest defeat

articles.title: Nahid Rana rips through Pakistan to seal a final-session win for Bangladesh
articles.description: This is now Bangladesh's third consecutive win against Pakistan, after they won the 2024 series by 2-0 margin

articles.title: Shabnim Ismail reverses retirement and makes South Africa T20 World Cup squad
articles.description: The 37-year-old fast bowler last played international cricket in 2023 but will be on the plane to England this June

articles.title: Rahul Dravid unveiled as owner of ETPL's Dublin Guardians
articles.description: The league, co-owned by Bollywood star Abhishek Bachchan, features franchises owned by several former and current international cricketers

articles.title: Faheem Ashraf joins Yorkshire as replacement for Will Sutherland
articles.description: The club confirmed the overseas signing via an official media release.

articles.title: Bangladesh replace injured Shadman Islam with Zakir Hasan for second Test versus Pakistan
articles.description: While Tanzid Hasan is expected to be the primary option over Zakir, the latter might be seen featuring in the contest as a last-minute change to the planned XI ahead of the contest.

articles.title: Laura Wolvaardt, Nahid Rana named ICC Player of the Month for April
articles.description: Nahid Rana was Player of the Series as Bangladesh defeated New Zealand 2-1.
